title: Design pixel world and run through personas

log.context: Design pixel world and run through personas

Done. Here's a summary of what was completed:

**Design doc written** covering: Phaser 3 (no build step, CDN, single HTML file), Lobby + Congress Chamber + Offices map, 8x8 pixel sprites with walk/idle animations, SSE endpoint in serve.py driven by Temporal congress activities, speech bubbles with 120-char truncation and fade.

**Three persona reviews run:**

- **Kwame (architect):** Approved SSE architecture. Flagged 8x8 sprites as structurally wrong (bubbles will dwarf them). Demanded pathfind...(truncated)
